summary: Implemented Phase 9 as a docs-only approval gate and committed it on zvorygin/faction-phase-9 as f846e0a8. Added the approved Ekaterina faction brief plus rules/balance spec, linked them from the faction plan and design docs, and marked plans/faction/phase-9.md Done after the commit succeeded.
verification: rg topic coverage check passed for economy, loadout, production, first combat, signature ability, AI, prediction, art/readability, command namespace, generic-resource exclusion, and Phase 10 assignment path
normal git commit hook full local CI passed
gameplay_impact: No gameplay change. This phase only approves and scopes Ekaterina before implementation.
next_executor_notes: Phase 10 may implement only the Ekaterina start/economy/first-production slice documented in plans/faction/ekaterina-rules-spec.md, using the dev-only dev:ekaterina_opening assignment path. AI, prediction, normal lobby faction selection, generic resources, full roster work, and markTarget effect implementation remain out of Phase 10 scope.
manual_test_notes: No gameplay manual testing required. Human review should focus on approving the Ekaterina brief/spec, especially the Phase 10 production slice, Phase 11 markTarget ability policy, and deferred AI/prediction/lobby-selection decisions.
